base.title: Stackloom Admin
base.description: Stackloom admin console for unified management of users, tenants, roles and permissions.

auth.title: Stackloom Auth
auth.description: Sign in or register to access Stackloom.

notFound.title: This page may be vacationing on another planet 👽
notFound.description: The address may be wrong, or the page has moved. Head back home and navigate from there.

forbidden.title: Access denied, the permission officer is on duty 👮
forbidden.description: Permissions blocked the way. Try another account or contact an administrator for access.

signin.heroDescription: One sign-in takes you to both Admin and Web. Keep organization, permissions, and collaboration aligned.
signin.title: Sign in to your account
signin.subtitle: Enter your account details below to continue
signin.accountPlaceholder: Enter your phone number or account
signin.passwordPlaceholder: Enter a password with at least 8 characters
signin.agreementPrefix: By signing in, you agree to the
signin.contactAdmin: Contact your system administrator if you need an account.

toast.noOrg: No available organizations are linked to this account
toast.captchaExpired: Captcha state expired. Please sign in again.

validation.accountRequired: Enter your phone number or account
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters

tenantDialog.title: Choose an organization
tenantDialog.description: This account is linked to multiple organizations. Choose the tenant or campus to enter.

tip.default: Hold the slider and drag it to the far right
tip.moving: Hold the slider and drag it to the far right

signup.title: Welcome to Acme Inc.
signup.subtitle: Already have an account?
signup.agreementPrefix: By continuing, you agree to our

page.title: Users
page.subtitle: Manage system user profiles, contact details, and account states in one place.
page.emptyDescription: Try adjusting the filters or create a new system user first.

filters.keywordPlaceholder: Search username, nickname, email, or phone

toast.avatarInvalid: Please choose an image file for the avatar
toast.avatarUploadFailed: Avatar upload failed. Please try again later.

dialog.deleteDescription: Delete user "{username}"? This action cannot be undone.

create.title: Create user
create.description: Enter the basic information to create a user

profile.title: Profile details
profile.description: Additional display information for the user

validation.max: Username must be 50 characters or fewer
Nickname must be 100 characters or fewer
Email must be 255 characters or fewer
Phone number must be 20 characters or fewer

password.label: Password
password.tooltip: Password must be between 8 and 72 characters

validation.min: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.max: Password must be 72 characters or fewer
Bio must be 2000 characters or fewer

disabled.label: Disabled
disabled.description: The account is disabled and cannot access the system.

active.label: Active
active.description: The account can sign in and use the system normally.

locked.label: Locked
locked.description: The account is locked and requires administrator review.

page.title: Dictionaries
page.subtitle: Dictionaries are key-value structures commonly used for configuration, labels, and reusable business metadata.

dialog.deleteLeafDescription: Delete "{label}"? This action cannot be undone.
dialog.deleteBranchDescription: Delete "{label}" and all of its children? This action cannot be undone.

create.title: Create dictionary
create.description: Maintain tree nodes, value types, and business-facing labels

update.title: Edit dictionary
update.description: Update the current item's key, value, status, and notes

basic.title: Basic information
basic.description: Define display name, key-value pair, and dictionary type.

supplement.title: Notes & extension
supplement.description: Add business meaning, scope, and extended JSON configuration.

parent.label: Parent node
parent.description: Editing does not change the current parent-child relationship.

type.label: Dictionary type
type.lockedOnEdit: Dictionary type cannot be changed while editing.
type.lockedOnChild: Child nodes inherit the dictionary type from the parent.

validation.max: Dictionary type must be 100 characters or fewer
Display name must be 255 characters or fewer
Dictionary key must be 100 characters or fewer
Dictionary value must be 255 characters or fewer

sort.label: Sort order
sort.tooltip: Smaller numbers appear earlier in the list

validation.int: Sort order must be an integer
validation.min: Sort order cannot be less than 0

description.label: Description
description.placeholder: Record the scope, business meaning, or notes for this item.

validation.max: Description must be 500 characters or fewer

ext.label: Extended config
ext.description: Store extra configuration in JSON. Empty input is saved as an empty object.

validation.invalid: Extended config must be valid JSON

disabled.label: Disabled
disabled.description: This item is disabled and should no longer be used by the business layer.

active.label: Active
active.description: This item can be selected and consumed normally.

string.label: String
string.description: Good for labels, codes, and enum values.

sidebar.title: Dictionary tree
sidebar.subtitle: Browse the hierarchy on the left and select the current node.
sidebar.emptySearchDescription: Try another keyword or clear the search
sidebar.emptyDefaultDescription: Create a root node first, then add children

detail.emptyDescription: Select a node on the left to view details and children.
detail.noDescription: No additional description is available for this node.
detail.emptyChildrenTitle: No child items under this node
detail.emptyChildrenDescription: You can continue by adding child nodes.
detail.directChildrenDescription: Only direct child items of the current node are shown here.
